/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_diskii_lss.dir/diskii_lss_smoke_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_diskii_lss.dir/__/DiskImage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_diskii_lss.dir/__/DiskIICard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_diskii_lss.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_diskii_lss.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_diskii_lss.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_diskii_lss.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_diskii_lss.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_diskii_lss.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_diskii_lss.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o -o test_diskii_lss  -ldl -lm
